caption:
A glazier we work with kept missing the calls that paid best.

Smashed shopfront at 2am, broken patio door on a bank holiday — the emergencies always come out of hours, and if he didn't pick up they rang the next glazier in Google. So we gave him an after-hours receptionist: it answers, takes the details and books the emergency in, 24/7. The daytime quote requests get answered instantly too.

He sleeps through the phone now — and still wakes up to the job booked.

Missing the after-hours emergencies? Free audit — link in bio. 👇

#glazier #windowsanddoors #glazing #tradesbusiness #ukandireland
